meta.title: Reprint Push Remote Base
meta.description: Source WordPress site at the moment a local pull was taken.
meta.author: Reprint Push Lab

steps.code:
<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $post_id = wp_insert_post(array('import_id'=>1001,'post_title'=>'Shared base post','post_name'=>'shared-base-post','post_content'=>'Base content from source','post_status'=>'publish','post_author'=>1)); add_post_meta($post_id, 'reprint_push_fixture', 'shared', true); update_post_meta($post_id, '_reprint_push_forms_schema', array('owner'=>'forms','schemaVersion'=>'1','form'=>'contact','required'=>array('email','message'),'fields'=>array(array('key'=>'email','type'=>'email','label'=>'Email','enabled'=>true),array('key'=>'message','type'=>'textarea','label'=>'Message','enabled'=>true)),'notifications'=>array('admin'=>true,'copyToSender'=>false))); $dir = WP_CONTENT_DIR . '/uploads/reprint-push'; wp_mkdir_p($dir); file_put_contents($dir . '/shared.txt', 'base upload content'); update_option('reprint_push_plugin_payload', array('owner'=>'forms','mode'=>'base','version'=>1)); update_option('reprint_push_forms_fixture', array('owner'=>'forms','enabled'=>true,'revision'=>'001','forms'=>array('contact'=>array('title'=>'Contact us','version'=>'1','active'=>true,'fields'=>array('email','message'),'limits'=>array('daily'=>'25','perIp'=>'3')),'newsletter'=>array('title'=>'Newsletter','version'=>'1','active'=>false,'fields'=>array('email'),'segments'=>array('general','product'))),'routing'=>array('notify'=>array('admin@example.test'),'storeSubmissions'=>true),'flags'=>array('honeypot'=>true,'captcha'=>false))); $plugin_dir = WP_PLUGIN_DIR . '/reprint-push-forms-fixture'; wp_mkdir_p($plugin_dir); $plugin_basename = 'reprint-push-forms-fixture/reprint-push-forms-fixture.php'; file_put_contents(WP_PLUGIN_DIR . '/' . $plugin_basename, "<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Reprint Push Forms Fixture
Version: 1.0.0
*/
"); $active_plugins = get_option('active_plugins', array()); if (!in_array($plugin_basename, $active_plugins, true)) { $active_plugins[] = $plugin_basename; update_option('active_plugins', $active_plugins); } global $wpdb; $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'reprint_push_forms_lab'; $wpdb->query('CREATE TABLE ' . $table . ' (id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL, form_slug varchar(191) NOT NULL, payload_json longtext NOT NULL, updated_marker varchar(32) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (id)) ' . $wpdb->get_charset_collate()); $wpdb->replace($table, array('id'=>1,'form_slug'=>'contact','payload_json'=>wp_json_encode(array('owner'=>'forms','mode'=>'base','version'=>'1','rules'=>array('requireConsent'=>true,'maxAttachments'=>'2'))),'updated_marker'=>'base'), array('%d','%s','%s','%s'));
